nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS num_courses, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id) AS num_faculty, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_active_boards, COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id) AS num_scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(em.marks_awarded) AS avg_evaluation_marks_per_script
FROM   academic_unit au
JOIN   academic_unit_closure c ON c.ancestor_id = au.id
JOIN   academic_unit course ON course.id     = c.descendant_id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.department_id = au.id
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = au.id AND b.exam_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = b.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = sa.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  au.unit_type   = 'COURSE'
GROUP  BY au.name
ORDER  BY num_courses DESC;
error: Validation failed (syntax): SQL uses 'as' as a table alias. 'as' is a SQL reserved keyword and is likely causing parsing or validation failures. Please rename the alias to a non-keyword identifier (e.g., if you aliased answer_script to 'as', change it to 'a' or 'ans_scr').
